mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pipeline_job (pipeline_definition_id, job_name, job_type, execution_order, config_json, preset_id, created_at) VALUES
(#{definitionId}, #{j.jobName}, #{j.jobType}, #{j.executionOrder}, #{j.configJson}, #{j.presetId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT j.id, j.pipeline_definition_id, j.job_name, j.job_type, m.execution_order, j.config_json, j.preset_id, j.created_at FROM pipeline_job_mapping m JOIN pipeline_job j ON j.id = m.job_id WHERE m.pipeline_definition_id = #{definitionId} ORDER BY m.execution_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pipeline_job_dependency (pipeline_definition_id, job_id, depends_on_job_id) VALUES (#{definitionId}, #{jobId}, #{dependsOnJobId})
